75804.subject: How to hide from killer drones
75804.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzR9AAcAAAAAA92d9H7kZJ7W-GZurti7ZUi4L1Dw7D2ZFlB2XG38EVTMDlSj2uMvngGNd9ComFcKxANuqJRYmsF_b-mQfgb_RHVJJB-g-xN9Tn_bgLm42Q9HPw 

July 11th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzR9AAcAAAAAA92d9H7lKO9JhqEBNpv0M4FmTB2XiZOEex4ZAEHgRIN4-DuSyPhH-FpNxq37fKgxVbM4XCts7dlVE7zjN75hAyxFuTGxGsoUOJIIKFVXu4GpSQ 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzR9AAcAAAAAA92d9H7m5sxLO5oTOdYXEMVaAMa-bFVKdb9cc5Lx4YdYEwffy7OkiBzE75TY1Z0lCO_X6rEc2gi41GKyPUfOGGlvHsgSqBMkscrGBBlQCAnIKQ 



 
  


Dominic Rech

Senior newsletter editor



 The proliferation of drone warfare has made it extremely difficult for soldiers to hide on the battlefield. Or so we thought. Instead, it is giving rise to strange new forms of camouflage. In its war with Ukraine, Russia has introduced
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzR9AAcAAAAAA92d9H7n6M2XNe0S1M5De2JgCXxNGt19-23op3UfMSWUiEifVwpbkYfbP9KFUxNC4n7MkQjvbSYjabynGkjTGSkhHj7P6Z9AsuQRUtma 
peculiar black-and-white military lorries  
 to frustrate the machine-vision systems used by drones.


 If reading about military technology isn’t how you like to spend your weekend, we do have something else for you. It’s Wimbledon finals weekend. Analysis by The Economist examines how a player can turn

75802.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 11
75802.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-11-oleh-bezuhlyi-ssvmf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BPIV37SY5Srm8zItvG3GGWQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0ZcQzS4QzTEYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrgkqkrs~lm-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrgkqkrs-lm
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Geopolitics dominates the tape as Trump's collapsed Iran ceasefire drags Bitcoin below its recent range. Yet Washington delivered a landmark crypto win with a federal CBDC ban — even as Trump's own crypto profits draw Senate scrutiny. 🏛️ US Bans Fed CBDC as Housing Act Becomes Law The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act became law without Trump's signature, and tucked inside is a provision barring the Federal Reserve from ever issuing a central bank digital currency. It is the first time a CBDC prohibition has been enshrined in US federal law — a long-sought win for advocates who framed a digital dollar as a surveillance risk. Read full story 🏛️ Senate Democrats Demand Hearings Into Trump's $1.2B Crypto Windfall Top Democrats on key Senate committees called for formal hearings into the more than $1.2 billion President Trump reportedly earned from crypto ventures last year. The senators want to probe whether foreign-linked funding — including UAE-connected entities — may be shaping US crypto policy as the CLARITY Act advances through Congress. More details ⚖️ DOJ Moves to Drop Charges in $722M BitClub Fraud Case The Justice Department is moving to dismiss charges against Matthew Goettsche, accused of orchestrating the $722 million BitClub Network mining scheme. He had been set for an October trial on wire fraud conspiracy and unregistered securities counts, making the reversal a striking turn in one of crypto's largest fraud prosecutions. Read more 🚨 BonkDAO Treasury Drained of $20M in Governance Attack An attacker spent roughly $4.4 million buying BONK tokens to seize control of a governance vote, then drained about $20 million from BonkDAO's treasury. The exploit weaponized low quorum thresholds rather than a code bug, spotlighting a structural weakness baked into DAO governance design. See details 📉 Bitcoin Slides Over 3% as Trump Declares Iran Ceasefire Over Bitcoin fell more than 3% after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire over while signaling that talks would continue. The renewed geopolitical uncertainty pushed traders into risk-off positioning, with the token hovering near the $64K region amid broader market jitters. Read full story 🏦 Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Half Its BTC Empery Digital sold roughly half of its Bitcoin holdings, pivoting away from a treasury-accumulatio

75800.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-10-oleh-bezuhlyi-o2zgf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B0T7TdwuUT6Giwm1LW719Ww%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3GnHe_iunFEYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrgk8hb1~wv-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrgk8hb1-wv
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Bitcoin held near $64K as altcoin optimism built, yet Saylor's record Strategy sell-off rattled nerves. Washington dominated the tape — CBDC bans, CLARITY rules, a rejected Bitcoin bond — a market driven by policy, not price. 📉 Saylor's Strategy Unloads 3,588 BTC in Largest-Ever Sale Michael Saylor's Strategy offloaded 3,588 BTC — its biggest single liquidation to date — jolting a market long accustomed to the firm only accumulating. The move stirred fresh questions about corporate-treasury conviction, though Standard Chartered dismissed it as a signaling issue rather than a solvency one and kept its $100K year-end target. Read full story 🏛️ Trump Declines to Sign Housing Bill Carrying a Four-Year CBDC Ban President Trump refused to sign a bipartisan housing bill that bundled in a four-year ban on a US central bank digital currency, stalling what crypto advocates had hoped would be a clean legislative win. The delay leaves CBDC policy — and its knock-on effects for stablecoins — in limbo. More details ⚖️ SEC May Start Writing Crypto Rules Before the CLARITY Vote The SEC signaled it could begin drafting rules for issuers, broker-dealers and trading venues on separate tracks even before the Senate votes on the CLARITY Act, which faces an August 7 deadline. The parallel push suggests regulators aren't waiting for Congress to define market structure. Read more 🚫 New Hampshire Kills First-of-Its-Kind $100M Bitcoin Bond New Hampshire lawmakers rejected a pioneering $100 million Bitcoin-backed municipal bond in a final vote, despite the governor's public backing. The defeat underscores lingering institutional hesitance to fold volatile digital assets into public finance. See details 🤖 Revolut Wires Claude and Gemini Into Its Crypto Exchange Revolut connected its Revolut X exchange to AI assistants including Claude, Gemini, OpenClaw and Cursor, letting users analyze, backtest and execute trades through natural-language prompts. The integration pushes agentic trading further into mainstream retail finance. Read the details 🏦 JPMorgan's $4.7T Private-Blockchain Warning Fuels Bitcoin Bulls JPMorgan flagged Wall Street's shift toward closed, private blockchains as a deeper long-term threat to crypto than Strategy's selling, warning it could drain liquidity and capital from public networks. Paradoxically, bulls s

75798.subject:
The Solution to AI's Infrastructure Crisis Might Be Hiding in Plain
 Sight
75798.body:
Series Panthalassa offers exposure to potential first-in-class AI infrastructure

Series Panthalassa (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MVv7bt634DvN29rwgPvGYQvW5d86_w5RlVxmMLtlV-3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3lsW1tDlJq1c_Z2MW3Wkdc14F-ftzVvMKBz8wvYzBN8nSLfRRrBRnW4rDTNV1DLh0VW37ndX47n1WzgW3DDDJC8tbLCTW5dNDYh8dHhcxVRgzCz8_sD4QW2vc-cy3BF8pCW85B88t3YkWxHW55Pysp89M_-KW2qgZ9T26DqCjW3Csr3X4JNcKQW3SxPrL83wqDBW250S896-gx6QN8SLFBcj6M03W5-YSzP4BlfJ4W5Jmlfk2xMSP0VKn0107GNW7gW5Y3Lw76VFg3HW3xJrCK54-P7-N4mjV92Kzb5_W7NFtbQ76pW3FV6q-PJ7ptlmtN5LbBGWk7n8RW1LVZjQ6vLDV9W541HQT5XjN9Lf1r5TNv04 )

Hi Oleg,

The AI industry needs a lot more compute. And notably, it needs somewhere to put it.

Land-based data centers are running into roadblocks: power grids are stretched thin, cooling costs eat into margins, and communities are pushing back on the development of hyperscale facilities.¹

While some think the solution lies in space, Panthalassa (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MVv7bt634DvN29rwgPvGYQvW5d86_w5RlVxmMLtlV-3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3lsW1tDlJq1c_Z2MW3Wkdc14F-ftzVvMKBz8wvYzBN8nSLfRRrBRnW4rDTNV1DLh0VW37ndX47n1WzgW3DDDJC8tbLCTW5dNDYh8dHhcxVRgzCz8_sD4QW2vc-cy3BF8pCW85B88t3YkWxHW55Pysp89M_-KW2qgZ9T26DqCjW3Csr3X4JNcKQW3SxPrL83wqDBW250S896-gx6QN8SLFBcj6M03W5-YSzP4BlfJ4W5Jmlfk2xMSP0VKn0107GNW7gW5Y3Lw76VFg3HW3xJrCK54-P7-N4mjV92Kzb5_W7NFtbQ76pW3FV6q-PJ7ptlmtN5LbBGWk7n8RW1LVZjQ6vLDV9W541HQT5XjN9Lf1r5TNv04 ) is looking somewhere closer to home.

Panthalassa’s autonomous nodes are cooled by surrounding seawater while generating electricity from ocean waves. This powers AI servers that transmit data to land via low-Earth-orbit satellites.¹

While it might sound complicated, the logic is pretty straightforward. As one researcher put it, “free cooling and the isolation from variable environments on land” offer some major advantages.²

No grid required. No cooling infrastructure to build. No neighbors to upset.

Peter Thiel believes that Panthalassa has opened a new frontier,² which is why Founders Fund (Thiel’s VC firm) led Panthalassa’s recent Series B with an estimated $1 billion valuation.³

There’s no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for Panthalassa, or that the company will be profitable. See the risk disclosures on the offering page.

With Series Panthalassa (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MVv7bt634DvN29rwgPvGYQvW5d86_w5RlVxmMLtlV-3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3lsW1tDlJq1c_Z2MW3Wkdc14F-ftzVvMKBz8wvYzBN8nSLfRRrBRnW4rDTNV1DLh0VW37ndX47n1WzgW3DDDJC8tbLCTW5dNDYh8dHhcxVRgzCz8_sD4QW2vc-cy3BF8pCW85B88t3YkWxHW55Pysp89M_-KW2qgZ9T26DqCjW3Csr3X4JNcKQW3SxPrL83wqDBW250S896-gx6QN8SLFBcj6M03W5-YSzP4BlfJ4W5Jmlfk2xMSP0VKn0107GNW7gW5Y3Lw76VFg3HW3xJrCK54-P7-N4mjV92Kzb5_W7NFtbQ76pW3FV6q-PJ7ptlmtN5LbBGWk7n8RW1LVZjQ6vLDV9W541HQT5XjN9Lf1r5TNv04 ) , you can gain exposure to the company turning AI's biggest bottlenecks into an opportunity, one ocean data center at a time.

View Opportunity
(https://dxszH
